text: You have spent months using your strength and intelligence to break into the vaults of the wealthy to redistribute their ill gotten gains to those who really need it, the destitute. And if a few gold coins land in your pockets, well, who’s to say.……… Years have passed and as you reminisce about the distant past you can’t help but smile at your previous decisions. After all, they led you to become the living legend that you are today. The greatest mercenary with a heart of gold they say as they chant your name. Life is good, but you can’t help but imagine what life would be like if you had decided to stay a humble tavern worker. You probably wouldn’t be even half as rich you think to yourself as you drift off into a dream. Congratulations You Have Found The Outlaw Ending [New Game]
